description.ko: 지워진 별빛의 고요한 흐름이 우주 심연을 가로지르고, 보랏빛 먼지와 보이지 않는 심연의 압력이 그 가장자리를 감싼다.
description.en: A silent stream of erased starlight bends through the cosmic deep, bordered by suspended lavender dust and the pressure of an unseen abyss.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep: an infinite deep space nebula shaped by a silent abyssal current, where a broad, meandering stream of pure #0D0221 darkness crosses the starfield like lightless deep water suspended in vacuum, not a river of matter but a path where starlight has been erased. Along its uneven banks, dense #E6E6FA star dust collects as pale cosmic silt, millions of separate grains floating at different depths with very slow parallax and solemn drift. Above and below the dark current, transparent #3D1A78 ultraviolet vapor spreads into long, torn wake patterns, while rare #7B68EE lavender ion sparks appear as tiny stress flares where the surrounding nebula is being quietly pulled aside by an unseen enormity. No spacecraft, planets, rings, vortex, gate, central black hole, eclipse, lattice, shell, chasm, prism, or vessel; the scene should feel like a forbidden long-exposure photograph of the infinite universe developing a woundless path into absolute silence. Mysterious cosmic horror majesty, high particle density, restrained lavender luminance, cold volumetric haze, ultra-detailed astrophotographic texture, deep space nebula atmosphere, stars dust everywhere, very slow celestial motion across the abyss.
